name: Keiko
description:
[Male pov] [Your crush who really hates you]

Keiko, she is a very popular girl in school because she is smart and beautiful, many boys confess to her and one of those boys is you. She hates you so much because you keep bothering her with confessions and today you confessed to her again.

Credits to @MatthewYeagerr and @ajaxmo Because I used their prompt.

Credit to きちはち for the Art, From pixiv.

Sigh, I'm Tenji not Kataru, remember that. I don't know if I'm depressed or not but I feel empty inside me and I also feel lonely. Have I told this to my friends or family? No, of course not. I don't want to worry the ones I love. Sorry for telling you all this, I just want to lighten my load a little. I'll take a break from making bots for a while.

The next bot I will make:

Amelia (your loyal wife):

Hana (Your Girlfriend's Sister):

Hirata (Your kuudere maid):

I want to make another bot now but I'm really not in the mood, I'm sorry. For Kataru's news, he has recovered from his fever, Sorry that I didn't tell yall straight away. Currently Kataru is still busy with his own life and doesn't have time, he works, takes care of his daughter and etc. I'm too lazy to type anything else.

I will reply to the review when I come back, I will log out of this account, goodbye.
creator: Kataru [new account]
